organizationDescription:
Bula Vinaka! 
From a small jewellery shop in Sigatoka in 1941 to one of Fijis most respected and diversified business houses  the Tappoo Group of Companies stands as a true Fijian success story built on family values, integrity, and community spirit. 

For over eight decades, weve proudly served the people of Fiji and beyond, growing from humble beginnings to a multi-industry enterprise spanning retail, duty free, wholesale, automotive, manufacturing, travel, hospitality, petroleum, and real estate. What started with one mans dream  Mr. Tappoo Kanjis craftsmanship and honesty  has now become a legacy carried by generations of the Tappoo family and more than 1,800 passionate employees across the country.

Our flagship TappooCity shopping centres in Suva and Lautoka, along with Tappoo Duty Free at Nadi and Nausori International Airports, bring world-class shopping experiences to both locals and visitors. Through Kia Fiji, Tappoo Travel Centre, and our network of service stations and retail outlets, we continue to drive innovation, service excellence, and national growth.

Beyond business, the Tappoo Group believes deeply in giving back. Through our community outreach, education sponsorships, and local partnerships, we proudly support initiatives that uplift Fijian families and strengthen our shared future. Our values remain rooted in trust, care, and togetherness  the same principles that have guided us since day one.

As we look ahead, our mission is simple: to continue building a brighter, sustainable, and connected Fiji  with innovation in our business, pride in our people, and love for our islands. 

Visit our website www.tappoo.com.fj or follow us here for the latest updates from our brands, events, and community stories
